sequenceDiagram %%{init: {'theme': 'neutral'}}%% participant Agent as Agent Execution participant OTel as Cloud Trace (OTel) participant Eval as Vertex EvalTask participant BQ as BigQuery (Sink) participant Looker as Looker Dashboards Agent->>OTel: Emit Spans (Latency, Tokens) Agent->>Eval: Send Prompt/Response Pairs Eval-->>Eval: Score via Custom Rubric (1-5 Ratings) Eval->>BQ: pd.DataFrame.to_gbq() append note right of BQ: Data schema includes Timestamp,
Agent_Version, and Eval Scores. Looker->>BQ: Query average scores grouped by time Looker->>OTel: (Optional) Correlate with operational data
